# Christian José Torrealba Rondón - llms.txt
# Updated: April 2026

# Profile
Name: Christian José Torrealba Rondón
Title: Product-Focused Engineer | Bridging Product Strategy, Web Technologies, Data Strategy and Agile Leadership
Specialization: Product Engineering • Full-Stack Development • Business Intelligence
Professional Summary: Highly accomplished Product Engineer with deep expertise in product discovery, digital strategy, agile leadership and data-driven solutions. Combines strong technical skills in modern web technologies with business intelligence and product ownership to deliver exceptional user-centric digital products.

# Core Expertise
- Product Engineering & Product Ownership
- Full-Stack Software Development (Frontend & Backend)
- Business Intelligence, Data Analytics & ETL processes
- Agile Leadership & Team Mentorship (PSM-I, PSPO-I, PAL-I)
- Digital Strategy & Experimentation
- API Design & System Architecture

# Key Technologies
Frontend: React, TypeScript, Vue, Svelte, Astro, Tailwind, Vite, Webpack
Backend & APIs: Node.js, Python, GraphQL, RESTful APIs, Drizzle, Sequelize
Data & BI: Power BI, Tableau, SQL Server (SSAS/SSIS), BigQuery, Pentaho BI, R Statistics
Testing: Jest, Cypress, Playwright
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Sentry, Grafana, Docker
Design & Tools: Figma, Notion, Jira, Confluence, Segment, Amplitude, Google Analytics

# Professional Experience Highlights
• Senior Product Software Engineer – Zeelo (Mobility) | 2024–2025
• Solutions Engineer (Full-Stack) – Stuart Delivery (Logistics) | 2020–2023
• Frontend Developer Architect – Zank Financial (Fintech) | 2019–2020
• Frontend Software Engineer – SDG Group (Data & BI) | 2018–2019
• Product Software Engineer – PDVSA (Energy & Data Intelligence) | 2011–2016

# Education
• Expert Diploma in Tech Management & Technical Leadership – Polytechnic University of Valencia
• Master in e-Business Management – University of Barcelona
• Postgraduate in Business Intelligence – Autonomous University of Barcelona
• Degree in Systems Engineering – UNEFA (Venezuela)

# Certifications
• Professional Scrum Product Owner I (PSPO-I)
• Professional Scrum Master I (PSM-I)
• Professional Agile Leadership (PAL-I)
• Generative AI for Product Managers – PMI
• Enterprise Design Thinking Practitioner – IBM
• System Thinking for Project Management – MIT

# Languages
Spanish (Native) • English (Professional) • French (Pre-Intermediate)

# Philosophy
V-Shaped professional who connects strategy, execution, and data to deliver high-impact digital solutions.
